prompt: A geometric collage using cut-out shapes of different natural textures: wood, stone, and foliage, all layered to form a modern abstract landscape.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of a modern abstract landscape. The landscape is formed by a geometric collage of distinct, crisp cut-out shapes. These shapes are intricately layered and overlapping, showcasing varied natural textures: authentic wood grain, rugged stone, and detailed foliage patterns.
